data.title: Innovent Biologics partners with Takeda for new therapies; global collaboration effective after satisfying conditions.
data.description: Innovent Biologics, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol 01801, recently revealed that their partnership with Takeda, a multinational pharmaceutical company listed on both the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the symbol 4502 and the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol TAK, has been finalized. The collaboration has officially commenced after meeting all the necessary requirements for closure.

data.title: Shari Conditt wins inaugural Justice Sandra Day O'Connor Prize, honoring civic education excellence. Woodland High School teacher.
data.description: In Woodland, Washington, Shari Conditt, a teacher at Woodland High School, has been announced as the inaugural recipient of an award recognizing Justice O'Connor's impact on civic education. The award was given by iCivics, a prominent nonprofit organization dedicated to civic education. This news was announced on December 4, 2025, in Washington, D.C. Shari Conditt becomes the first recipient to be honored with this award, highlighting her exceptional contributions in the field of civic education.

data.title: eosera® Foundation gives $5,000 scholarship to Texas Christian University students for marketing campaign.
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, on December 4, 2025, the eosera® Foundation granted a scholarship worth $5,000 to a team of students from Texas Christian University for their innovative work in crafting a marketing campaign for the organization. The project was supervised by Dr. Jennifer D'Angelo, who serves as Assistant Professor at the university.

data.title: Advanced Real Estate purchased 104 units in Santa Ana, adding to its 12,000-unit portfolio in SoCal. Now owns 1,750 units in the city.
data.description: In December 4, 2025, Irvine-based company Advanced Real Estate completed the acquisition of the Newhope Village apartments, further expanding its substantial portfolio in Southern California to over 12,000 units. The addition of Newhope Village aligns seamlessly with their existing properties, boosting their total units in the city to more than 1,750.

data.title: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico reports 2.0% decrease in passenger traffic in November 2025 compared to 2024.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico on December 4th, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. disclosed early terminal passenger traffic data for November 2025 in comparison to November 2024. The company, also known as GAP, revealed these initial figures. The numbers relate to the stock ticker symbols on NYSE (PAC) and BMV (GAP).

data.title: GlobeScan survey finds 2/3 consumers trust BAP label, prompting 2026 consumer campaign for Global Seafood Alliance.
data.description: In Portsmouth, New Hampshire on December 4, 2025, a recent study conducted by GlobeScan on behalf of the Global Seafood Alliance (GSA) gathered insights from at least 1,000 respondents across five significant nations: Canada, France, Spain, the United Kingdom, and the United States. The individuals surveyed were chosen as they were consumers who had a strong interest in seafood products.

data.title: Oklo stock drops after $1.5 billion offering - shares fell in after-hours trading after agreement to offer common stock.
data.description: In extended trading on Thursday, Oklo, Inc. (NYSE: OKLO) saw a decline in stock value following the announcement of an equity distribution agreement to potentially offer up to $1.5 billion worth of common stock. The company will be issuing Class A common stock in an at-the-market transaction as outlined in an SEC filing. The news led to a drop in Oklo shares during after-hours trading as investors reacted to the development. Prior to this, the stock had experienced a 15% increase during Thursday's regular trading session. For further details, please refer to the complete article on financial news platform, Benzinga.com.
